channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
item.description:
📊 Score: 165 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:meta ai(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)
  • top_research

📄 Summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says....

item.title: [2] [大V/权威] OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
item.description:
📊 Score: 153 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems....

item.title: [3] [大V/权威] AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
item.description:
📊 Score: 148 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)
  • top_research
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper....
